reviews.review_description: Have fun and burn those calories.
Great warm-up between smashing objects with boxing gloves or a variety of weapons + dodging different objects.  Really like how you can adjust the size and speed of the objects.

I love this game. After a hard day, I always turn it on to relax a bit. It turns out that hitting the ball with various objects and breaking the balls is very relaxing. You can vent all your anger. After a while, however, I get annoyed that I hit everything so perfectly, I think the game helps a bit too much. I think it should be a little harder in the harder levels. Apart from that, very positive. If you ever wanted to smash something with a baseball, here's your chance :)

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review. Actually in the harder levels you need to hit the ball harder for better accuracy, so I assume that was the case :)
Badges are available in new version. Please report such things via Discord.

reviews.review_description: so easy, but works, just select the weapon (gloves are my favourite) and hit hard the ball, I got tired pretty fast
